rule: T19.12-C rule-only memory stress index: Day 19 memory/stress evidence uses tools/scripts/perf/day19_profile.json profiles.ci.rss_slope_mb_per_hour_max, profiles.ci.rss_delta_mb_max, profiles.smoke.rss_slope_mb_per_hour_max, profiles.smoke.rss_delta_mb_max, profiles.smoke_fail.outcome_ok_rate_max, profiles.gha_6h.rss_slope_mb_per_hour_max, and profiles.full.disk_budget_mb. XIX-MEM-10 slope and RSS thresholds plus XIX-MEM-13 smoke_fail negative thresholds remain documented and workflow-driven; this contract intentionally has no blocking smoke gate.
